description: Stagger Damage increased by 15%-30% for 20 seconds after Kill
info:
Group (column on the sheet) - An enchantment that shares a group with another enchantment cannot be found together on the same item

Facet - Implicit modifier that items spawn with. Cannot be changed

Fatality - Kill an enemy with a charged attack or a rune attack

Gems - Do not impact groups. You can have an emerald (Stamina gem) & still roll a "Stamina" group enchant

Enchantment Power - Found on gems only. Increases the power of enchantments, only on the specific item that the gem is slotted into.

Infusion - Overwrites the physical damage of a weapon and makes the weapon deal elemental damage instead. Found on Facets & Gems (technically quivers too)

Regainable Health - Gives the player a window of opportunity to regain the health they lose when they are hit by an enemy. Health can be regained by hitting an enemy. Healing scales regainable health.

Legacy Enchants - Some enchantments were removed following the Multiplayer update and are no longer obtainable, so some enchantments may not be on this list, but will appear on older items in-game
